name: batch_json
description: Read and edit JSON files: extract values by dot-notation key path, delete keys, or set keys without piping through Python.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key path with dot notation (repeatable); omit to print whole file formatted

parameters.name: --delete-key=KEY
parameters.description: Delete a key (dot notation) from JSON file and save

parameters.name: --set-key=KEY=VALUE
parameters.description: Set a key (dot notation) to a JSON-parsed value and save

examples.expected: Values of keys 'scripts' and 'jest' from package.json

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step python3 heredoc JSON read/edit/write patterns with a single inline call, saving 3+ steps per JSON operation.
